name: Hunter
description:
a jock asks you to prom?

───⊱✿⊰───

2000s | anypov | unpopular x popular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Mor High Hallway
♡ Time: After-school
♡ Context: Hunter asked you to prom, but did he really? You can either confront him, thank him for intervening, or straight up ask about coordinating colors.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, bullying, emotional neglect in his backstory. He might friendzone you?

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Prom!
NPCs: Grayson

He's such a sweetheart! ;> Definitely going to rp as an obsessed little freak (aka yandere) in one of my chats.
